label: 14523 Program implementation

children.text: the responsible federal official has decided that applications and plans relating to the program or project are not incompatible with the provisions and objectives of federal laws that the official administers that are not inconsistent with this subtitle; and

children.label: A
children.text: meets the applicable criteria under and the requirements of the development planning process under ; andsection 14524 of this titlesection 14525 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: will contribute to the development of the Appalachian region.

children.heading: .—Decision Is Controlling
children.label: b .—Decision Is Controlling
children.text: A decision under subsection (a)(2) is controlling and shall be accepted by the federal agencies.
